name: Renewable Floor Constraint
description: Adds a minimum renewable energy share constraint via PyPSA's extra_functionality hook. Select which carriers in your workbook count as renewable, then set the minimum share floor.

renewable_carriers.label: Renewable carriers
renewable_carriers.description: Select which carriers count as renewable. The list is populated from your workbook's Carriers sheet.

renewable_floor.label: Minimum renewable share
renewable_floor.description: Minimum fraction of total generation that must come from the selected renewable carriers.
